Interview Text:
Dena

(part 4-concluded)

There was one time she actually heard a voice in her head. This is what she said;

"I heard a voice once. I've always said it was an angel. I was driving home from choir practice and was at a red light, waiting for it to change. It changed green, and a voice said, "Not yet." and a car sped through, running the red light. 

I asked her about it and she said she wasn't able to identify the tone of the voice or if it was a man's or a woman's voice. It was just very explicit words said into her head. She said, 'I felt like it was like a guardian angel." 

And lastly, Dena says another way she hears God is when someone says something to you when that's what you need to hear at the time.
Music Video Instructions: Try to let God reset a purer vision of him within you, one that replaces the other things that have such allure.
Music Video Description: Audrey Assad- be thou my vision
